zh.lifeSummary: Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire是Adam Baseline Prince的兒子，於大約1450年出生在英國奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼。他和Isabella Hunt至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他於1623年在英國史洛普爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1523年在英國史洛普爾享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Prince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: nickname from Middle English, Old French prince (from Latin princeps).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Prinz ‘prince’, or its Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or some other Slavic cognate Princ, from princ ‘prince’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Primc: status name for one who lives in the house of his father-in-law, from a derivative of primiti ‘to accept, to take over’.

variants.name: Prinz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Matthias, Ulrich, Arno, Friedrich, Hans, Klaus, Mechthild.

German: nickname from Middle High German prinze ‘prince’, presumably denoting someone who behaved in a regal manner or who had won the title in some contest of skill. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Czechia.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire was born about 1450, in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England as the son of Adam Baseline Prince. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Isabella Hunt. In 1623, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Shropshire, England. He died in 1523, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire est né environ 1450, à Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, fils de Adam Baseline Prince. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Isabella Hunt. En 1623, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Shropshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1523, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

Er hatte mit Isabella Hunt mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1623 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Shropshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1523 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshireは約1450年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヌネハム コウルテナイでAdam Baseline Princeの息子として生まれた。彼はIsabella Huntとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。1623年，イギリスシュロプシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1523年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire(은)는 대략 1450년 영국 스퍼드실르 누니함 쿠르텐아이에서 Adam Baseline Prince의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Isabella Hunt(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1623년, 그의 직업은 영국 슈럽실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1523년 영국 슈럽실르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire родился около 1450 г. в местности нунэам коуртенеи, оксфордшир, Англия. Его отца звали Adam Baseline Prince. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Isabella Hunt. В 1623 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности шропшир, Англия. Он умер в 1523 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.
